授業目的: To obtain fluency and confidence in expressing yourself in English, and train guidance of others in English usages.
到達目標: The participant can produce well-argued texts. They can give an oral presentation. They can organize a 40-minute class and teach their peers a topic in English.
授業方法: Class instructions, group work, individual presentation and feedback.  Writing and presentation assignments,  diary-keeping, and individual, longer oral presentations.

第1回:
【Startup Week】"Face-to-face class" 《30minutes》
Introduction to the course and ourselves. 
 【Flex Hours】《420minutes》To be used for keeping a hand-written diary in English. You have 10 weeks to write between 37 and 63 pages of 80 words. You will get a note-book for the project in class.
第2回:
【Core Week 1】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Picture analysis exercise. Description, analysis, deduction.
At home: write an analysis of the picture your have been assigned. Post your 300-word description, analysis, and deduction on LUNA.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
What makes a good oral presentation? We will look at examples of public speaking, discuss what makes them good. Write a draft of your own 7-minute presentation, due in two weeks.
Prepare a 7-minute speech in English on a topic you are familiar with. To be delievered in class in week 5 or 6.
第6回:
【Core Week 5】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Oral presentations 1. Up to 6 persons will give a 7-minute presentation each. All participants must be ready to give their presentation, so they can give it any time they is called. The audience must give feedback in writing, according to the instructions.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Oral presentations 1. Up to 6 persons will give a 7-minute presentation each. All participants must be ready to give their presentation, so they can give it any time they is called. The audience must give feedback in writing, according to the instructions.
第14回:
【Startup Week】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
September Welcome back. Orientation about assignment: The "Be a teacher - give a 40-minute class and teach the rest of us." (May be shortened to 30-minute class, depending on the number of participants).
第15回:
【Core Week 13】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
What makes a good teaching/learning experience?
Prepare the class you will teach. Time managment is one of the challenges - the margine is one percent. More or less than that = lower grade.
第18回:
【Core Week 16】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Be a teacher - give a 40-minute class and teach the rest of us. 2 persons. Peer feedback. When you have given your class and read the feedback from your peers, write and submit a report on that gives an outline of the class and highlights what went well, what you could improve, and how. The report is due on LUNA (課題レポート) one week after you have received the comments from your peers and teacher.
第19回:
【Core Week 17】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Be a teacher - give a 40-minute class and teach the rest of us. 2 persons.
第20回:
【Core Week 18】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Be a teacher - give a 40-minute class and teach the rest of us. 2 persons.
第21回:
【Core Week 19】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Be a teacher - give a 40-minute class and teach the rest of us. 2 persons.
トピック.授業外学習2: Homework will include preparing individual presentations and completing diverse assignments. Expect about 4 hours of homework per week.

学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
Feedback will be given on LUNA. Feedback for the diary will be written directly in the diary.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading2: 授業外学修課題／Assignment, homework required outside class (06)
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
成績評価Grading4: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
Peer-reviews, Active participation 30 pts. (NB: more than 3 absences/ term = 0)
成績評価Grading5: 備考　Note Active participation is essential. More than three absences per term without an acceptable reason will disqualify you. Copy-paste is illegal - if repeated you will fail the course. Using Generative AI is tempting. Remember, you must identify where you did, and you are responsible for the results.
